title: tanacetum saxicola
intro: Tanacetum saxicola, also known as mountain tansy, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Tanacetum saxicola include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
